empty_state.title: No work items
empty_state.description: Add work items to define the release scope.

confirm_remove.content: Are you sure you want to remove this work item from the release? It will remain in the project.

empty_state.title: No scope yet
empty_state.description: Add work items to the release to track their completion for this release.

not_found.title: Release not found
not_found.description: The release may have been deleted.

toast.work_items_added: {count, plural, one {Work item added} other {Work items added}}

delete_modal.title: Delete release
delete_modal.content: Are you sure you want to delete release "{releaseName}"? This action cannot be undone.

heading.title: Releases
heading.description: Manage project deliverables with precision using Releases.

toggle.title: Enable Releases
toggle.description: Workspace members will have view access to the scope within their respective projects.

success.title: Releases enabled
success.message: Releases have been enabled for this workspace.

error.title: Error
error.message: Failed to enable releases. Please try again.

success.title: Releases disabled
success.message: Releases have been disabled for this workspace.

error.title: Error
error.message: Failed to disable releases. Please try again.

tags.title: Release tags
tags.description: Categorise and filter your releases using tags.
tags.empty_state: No tags yet. Create your first tag.

errors.version_already_exists: A tag with this version already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

delete_modal.title: Delete tag
delete_modal.content: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{tagVersion}"? This action cannot be undone.

delete.error: Failed to delete tag. Please try again.

labels.title: Labels
labels.description: Structure and organise your initiatives with labels.
labels.empty_state: No labels yet. Create your first label.

errors.name_already_exists: A label with this name already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

delete_modal.title: Delete label
delete_modal.content: Are you sure you want to delete the label "{labelName}"? This action cannot be undone.

delete.error: Failed to delete label. Please try again.
